note: Evidence Curator v2.2 curation map for nevada-housing-affordability. One entry per bill: plain_topic (citizen wording), theme_id, relevance (core = housing affordability/supply, renting, or housing-program policy is the point of the bill; adjacent = touches housing in part; context = found by broad search or omnibus indexing but not housing policy). Themes are citizen-facing labels. Written by reading every NELIS Overview digest.

themes.renting-costs: Rent levels, fees, deposits, and what landlords can charge
themes.tenant-protections: Evictions, housing discrimination, and renter protections
themes.affordable-housing-money: Money, tax breaks, and financing for affordable and attainable housing
themes.corporate-buyers: Corporate and investor buying of homes
themes.buying-a-home: Buying and keeping a home (down payments, mortgages, foreclosure)
themes.zoning-density: Zoning, density, ADUs, and what can be built where
themes.manufactured-homes: Manufactured, mobile, tiny, and factory-built homes
themes.homelessness: Homelessness and getting people into housing
themes.housing-studies: Housing data, studies, and state housing bodies
